title: russelia pubescens
intro: Russelia pubescens, also known as the Jarilla or Coral Honeysuckle, is a flowering vine native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Russelia pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Russelia pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies and natural health supplements.
